title: ElytraKickstart
description: Automatically use fireworks when starting elytra flying.
body:
This mod simply uses a firework rocket in your hotbar once as soon as you start flying with an elytra. It also switches back to the slot you originally had selected in your hotbar. Great feature for lazy people ;) > If you want to support my work <3
> https://ko-fi.com/bridgersilk
